mappings.reason: Establishing the data recovery process provides the foundational framework that BM-01's backup configuration implements — coverage under Rule 7 as the process enables the configuration action.
Perform Automated Backups directly executes the periodic backup action BM-01 requires to enable system operation resumption after failure.
Protecting recovery data ensures the integrity of backups that BM-01 configures — coverage under Rule 7 as BM-01's backup objective depends on protected recovery data.
Establishing isolated recovery data instances addresses BM-01's redundancy requirement through offline, cloud, or off-site backup destinations — shared backup configuration lifecycle under Rule 8.
Testing backup recovery validates that BM-01's backup configuration enables system operation resumption — coverage under Rule 7/8 as testing confirms the configured backup capability.
